chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2509 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRESENT: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of Bail Application. ----------- Dated; 17th November 2025 Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. -*-*-*-*-*- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:-- Police of Bin Qasim arrested applicant on 04.07.2025 from Gate No.4, Steel Mill Road near Railway Crossing, Bin Qasim, Malir, Karachi and from his possession allegedly charras of 1025 grams was recovered, hence he was booked in the present case. The ground for bail advanced by Applicant’s counsel is that he is innocent; there is four days delay in sending sample of case property for analysis to Chemical Examiner and description of the property is not mentioned in the FIR. His arguments have been opposed by learned Addl. P.G. Sindh. The ground advanced by Applicant’s counsel in defence can only be considered at the trial after recording of evidence, as it requires deeper appreciation. Prima facie, from applicant’s possession 1025 grams of charras was recovered, which is punishable from 9 to 14 years, hence he is not entitled to bail. Accordingly, bail application is dismissed. [Page 2] The bail application is disposed of, the findings hereinabove are tentative in nature. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
